raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Sonoma State Commitment initiative will provide tens of thousands of students in the North Bay region with life-changing educational opportunities.",
    "The initiative will start with a $45 million state investment aimed at growing and stabilizing Sonoma State University's key programs.",
    "The Sonoma State Commitment includes building a first-of-its-kind career center to connect students and graduates with local employers.",
    "The initiative aims to launch an aggressive recruitment campaign to expand college access for thousands of students.",
    "New academic degrees will be invested in to address regional and statewide workforce needs as part of the Sonoma State Commitment.",
    "The nursing program at Sonoma State University will be expanded to meet growing demand from patients and healthcare facilities.",
    "The $45 million state budget allocation is intended to restore planned cuts and improve student enrollment.",
    "If enacted, bill SB 640 could allow Sonoma State and under-enrolled CSU campuses to automatically admit every qualified high school student in California.",
    "Higher education significantly contributes to California becoming the fourth-largest economy in the world.",
    "Sonoma State University is referred to as an economic powerhouse and community hub that changes lives for good."
  ]
}
```
